name: PharmaOS WF4 — Advanced Multi-Domain Daily Intelligence Digest v5.0.0

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger — Daily 8AM
nodes.notes: Daily CRON at 08:00 AM. Fires the standard 24h intelligence digest.

nodes.name: Execute Workflow Trigger — Adaptive/Manual
nodes.notes: Called by WF2 on CRITICAL compound events, or manually by ops. Passes triggerType: adaptive|manual|weekly.

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.emailPayload?.subject || 'PharmaOS Intelligence Digest' }}
parameters.message:
={{ $json.emailPayload?.html || '

No HTML body generated for this run.

' }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO pharmaos_audit_log (
  event_type,
  domain,
  actor,
  action,
  new_state,
  pipeline_version
) VALUES (
  'DIGESTGENERATED',
  'all',
  'wf4-digest',
  'WF4_DIGEST_COMPLETED',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    domainBriefings: $json.domainBriefings || {},
    csvFilename: $json.csvFilename || null,
    pagerdutySkipped: $json.pagerdutySkipped || false,
    emailTo: $json.emailPayload?.to || null,
    executionId: $execution.id,
    workflowId: $workflow.id,
    workflowName: $workflow.name
  }) }}'::jsonb,
  5
)
RETURNING id, created_at;

INSERT INTO pharmaos_system_health (metric_name, metric_value, unit, tags, recorded_at)
VALUES
  ('wf4.digest.generated',           1,                                                                        'count',  '{{ JSON.stringify({ run_id: $json._meta?.run_id, trigger: $json._meta?.trigger_type }) }}'::jsonb, NOW()),
  ('wf4.digest.signals_processed',   {{ $json._meta?.total_signals ?? 0 }},                                   'count',  '{{ JSON.stringify({ run_id: $json._meta?.run_id }) }}'::jsonb,                                      NOW()),
  ('wf4.digest.risk_score',          {{ $json.analytics?.risk?.score ?? 0 }},                                 'score',  '{{ JSON.stringify({ risk_level: $json.analytics?.risk?.level }) }}'::jsonb,                         NOW()),
  ('wf4.digest.compound_events',     {{ $json._meta?.compound_events ?? 0 }},                                 'count',  '{}'::jsonb,                                                                                          NOW()),
  ('wf4.digest.executive_escals',    {{ $json._meta?.exec_escalations ?? 0 }},                                'count',  '{}'::jsonb,                                                                                          NOW()),
  ('wf4.digest.override_violations', {{ $json._meta?.override_violations ?? 0 }},                             'count',  '{}'::jsonb,                                                                                          NOW()),
  ('wf4.digest.blind_spots',         {{ $json._meta?.blind_spots ?? 0 }},                                     'count',  '{}'::jsonb,                                                                                          NOW()),
  ('wf4.digest.ai_tokens_exec',      {{ $json._meta?.estimated_tokens ?? 0 }},                                'count',  '{{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.execAI?.model }) }}'::jsonb,                                       NOW()),
  ('wf4.digest.compute_latency_ms',  {{ $json.analytics?.computeLatencyMs ?? 0 }},                            'ms',     '{{ JSON.stringify({ run_id: $json._meta?.run_id }) }}'::jsonb,                                      NOW()),
  ('wf4.digest.high_pct',            {{ $json.analytics?.global?.highCount && $json.analytics?.global?.totalSignals ? Math.round(($json.analytics.global.highCount / $json.analytics.global.totalSignals) * 100) : 0 }},  'pct', '{}'::jsonb, NOW()),
  ('wf4.digest.confidence_high_pct', {{ $json.analytics?.global?.confDist?.high ?? 0 }},                      'pct',    '{}'::jsonb,                                                                                          NOW()),
  ('wf4.digest.convergence_score',   {{ $json.analytics?.convergenceScore ?? 0 }},                            'score',  '{}'::jsonb,                                                                                          NOW());

SELECT refreshpharmaosviews();
SELECT COUNT(*) AS signals_in_views FROM mv_signal_dashboard;

WITH domain_stats AS (
  SELECT
    signal_domain,
    impact_level,
    signal_type,
    COUNT(*)                                                          AS cnt,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE competitor_flag = TRUE)                    AS competitor_cnt,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_urgent = TRUE)                          AS urgent_cnt,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE version = 1)                               AS new_cnt,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE version > 1)                               AS updated_cnt,
    ROUND(AVG(impact_score)::numeric, 2)                              AS avg_score,
    MAX(impact_score)                                                 AS peak_score,
    ROUND(AVG(priority_score)::numeric, 2)                            AS avg_priority,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE confidence = 'high')                       AS conf_high,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE confidence = 'medium')                     AS conf_med,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE confidence = 'low')                        AS conf_low,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE override_status IS NOT NULL
                     AND   override_status != '')                     AS override_cnt,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE route_tier IN ('CRITICAL','SAFETY_ESCALATION')) AS critical_cnt,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY impact_score)         AS median_score,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY impact_score)         AS p90_score
  FROM signals_mesh
  WHERE last_seen_at > NOW() - '{{ $json.windows.primary }}'::interval
    AND ai_processed = TRUE
  GROUP BY signal_domain, impact_level, signal_type
)
SELECT * FROM domain_stats
ORDER BY signal_domain,
  CASE impact_level WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'MED' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END;

nodes.name: Fetch Signals by Domain
nodes.notes: Per-domain signal stats with percentile scoring.

nodes.name: Compute Analytics — 14 Factors
nodes.notes: 14-factor analysis: global metrics, domain breakdown, trends, compound events, indication heatmap, geo density, velocity, portfolio gaps, composite risk score, strategy overlay, pipeline health, type/source distribution, top drugs, safety flags.

nodes.name: Aggregate Domain Briefs
nodes.notes: Aggregates 4 domain brief AI responses with error handling.

nodes.name: Build Context1
nodes.notes: Determines trigger type, time windows, audience config, generates runId.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  source_id,
  signal_domain,
  signal_type,
  title,
  drug_name,
  entity_name,
  indication,
  sponsor,
  phase,
  status,
  moa,
  modality,
  geography,
  nct_id,
  impact_level,
  impact_score,
  priority_score,
  route_tier,
  notif_priority,
  competitor_flag,
  is_urgent,
  confidence,
  ai_summary,
  recommended_action,
  score_breakdown,
  ai_classification,
  override_status,
  override_by,
  override_reason,
  asset_id,
  version,
  quality_score,
  url,
  first_seen_at,
  last_seen_at,
  safety_severity,
  patient_impact_estimate,
  fingerprint,
  CASE WHEN version = 1 THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'UPDATE' END               AS signal_status,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - first_seen_at)) / 3600.0             AS age_hours,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - last_seen_at))  / 60.0               AS minutes_since_update,
  RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY signal_domain ORDER BY impact_score DESC NULLS LAST) AS domain_rank
FROM signals_mesh
WHERE last_seen_at > NOW() - '{{ $json.windows.primary }}'::interval
  AND ai_processed = TRUE
ORDER BY
  CASE impact_level WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'MED' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,
  impact_score DESC NULLS LAST,
  is_urgent    DESC NULLS LAST,
  last_seen_at DESC
LIMIT 120;

nodes.name: Fetch Top Signals Detail1
nodes.notes: Full signal detail with domain ranking and freshness metrics.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  DATE(last_seen_at)                                               AS signal_date,
  signal_domain,
  impact_level,
  COUNT(*)                                                         AS cnt,
  ROUND(AVG(impact_score)::numeric, 2)                             AS avg_score,
  SUM(CASE WHEN competitor_flag THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                AS competitor_cnt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN version = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                    AS new_cnt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN version > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                    AS updated_cnt,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE route_tier IN (
    'CRITICAL','SAFETY_ESCALATION','HIGH','HIGH_COMPETITOR'
  ))                                                               AS high_tier_cnt,
  ROUND(STDDEV(impact_score)::numeric, 3)                          AS score_stddev
FROM signals_mesh
WHERE last_seen_at > NOW() - '{{ $json.windows.trend }}'::interval
  AND ai_processed = TRUE
GROUP BY DATE(last_seen_at), signal_domain, impact_level
ORDER BY signal_date DESC, signal_domain;

nodes.name: Fetch Trend Data1
nodes.notes: Time-series trend with stddev for volatility analysis.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  title,
  domains,
  signal_ids,
  compound_risk_score,
  trigger_pattern,
  pattern_metadata,
  ai_narrative,
  recommended_actions,
  escalation_level,
  resolved,
  false_positive,
  detected_at,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - detected_at)) / 60.0                AS age_minutes,
  COALESCE(array_length(signal_ids, 1), 0)               AS affected_signal_count
FROM compound_events
WHERE detected_at   > NOW() - '{{ $json.windows.compound }}'::interval
  AND resolved       = FALSE
  AND false_positive = FALSE
ORDER BY
  CASE escalation_level WHEN 'EXECUTIVE' THEN 1 WHEN 'SENIOR' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,
  compound_risk_score DESC;

nodes.name: Fetch Active Compound Events1
nodes.notes: Active compound events with age and affected signal count.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(drug_name),''), NULLIF(TRIM(entity_name),''), 'Unknown') AS entity,
  sponsor,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(indication),''), 'Unknown')                AS indication,
  signal_domain,
  COUNT(*)                                                        AS signal_count,
  MAX(impact_score)                                               AS peak_score,
  ROUND(AVG(impact_score)::numeric, 2)                            AS avg_score,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT signal_type, ', ')                          AS signal_types,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT source,      ', ')                          AS sources,
  MIN(first_seen_at)::date                                        AS first_seen,
  MAX(last_seen_at)                                               AS latest_at,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_urgent  = TRUE)                       AS urgent_cnt,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE route_tier IN ('CRITICAL','SAFETY_ESCALATION')) AS critical_cnt,
  ROUND(AVG(priority_score)::numeric, 2)                          AS avg_priority
FROM signals_mesh
WHERE competitor_flag = TRUE
  AND last_seen_at   > NOW() - '{{ $json.windows.trend }}'::interval
  AND ai_processed   = TRUE
GROUP BY entity, sponsor, indication, signal_domain
ORDER BY peak_score DESC, signal_count DESC
LIMIT 25;

nodes.name: Fetch Competitor Radar1
nodes.notes: Competitor activity heatmap with urgency and priority signals.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.id                                                            AS asset_id,
  a.name                                                          AS asset_name,
  a.phase,
  a.strategic_priority,
  a.indication,
  COALESCE(mv.total_signals,  0)                                  AS total_signals,
  COALESCE(mv.high_signals,   0)                                  AS high_signals,
  COALESCE(mv.peak_score,     0)                                  AS peak_score,
  COALESCE(recent.cnt_24h,    0)                                  AS signals_24h,
  COALESCE(recent.high_24h,   0)                                  AS high_24h,
  COALESCE(recent.comp_24h,   0)                                  AS competitor_24h,
  COALESCE(recent.urgent_24h, 0)                                  AS urgent_24h,
  COALESCE(ce.active_compounds,  0)                               AS active_compound_events,
  COALESCE(ce.max_risk,          0)                               AS compound_peak_risk,
  COALESCE(ce.exec_escalations,  0)                               AS exec_escalation_count
FROM pharmaos_assets a
LEFT JOIN mv_asset_signal_summary mv ON mv.asset_id = a.id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)                                                      AS cnt_24h,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE impact_level    = 'HIGH')              AS high_24h,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE competitor_flag = TRUE)                AS comp_24h,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_urgent       = TRUE)                AS urgent_24h
  FROM signals_mesh s
  WHERE s.asset_id     = a.id
    AND s.last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
    AND s.ai_processed = TRUE
) recent ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)                                                      AS active_compounds,
    MAX(compound_risk_score)                                      AS max_risk,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE escalation_level = 'EXECUTIVE')        AS exec_escalations
  FROM compound_events ce2
  WHERE ce2.resolved       = FALSE
    AND ce2.false_positive = FALSE
    AND a.id = ANY(
      SELECT UNNEST(ARRAY(
        SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(
          COALESCE(ce2.pattern_metadata->'assetids', '[]'::jsonb)
        )
      ))
    )
) ce ON TRUE
ORDER BY
  CASE a.strategic_priority
    WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 3 ELSE 4
  END,
  COALESCE(mv.high_signals, 0) DESC;

nodes.name: Fetch Asset Portfolio Health1
nodes.notes: Full portfolio health with compound event exposure and blind spot detection.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  decision_type,
  asset_id,
  question,
  decision_made,
  decision_rationale,
  outcome,
  tags,
  made_by,
  made_at,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - made_at)) / 86400.0                 AS age_days
FROM strategy_memory
WHERE made_at > NOW() - '{{ $json.windows.strategy }}'::interval
ORDER BY made_at DESC
LIMIT 30;

nodes.name: Fetch Strategy Memory1
nodes.notes: Recent strategic decisions with age calculation.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  metric_name,
  ROUND(AVG(metric_value)::numeric, 4)                            AS avg_value,
  MAX(metric_value)                                               AS peak_value,
  MIN(metric_value)                                               AS min_value,
  COUNT(*)                                                        AS sample_count,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY metric_value)      AS p95_value,
  tags
FROM pharmaos_system_health
WHERE recorded_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY metric_name, tags
ORDER BY metric_name;

nodes.notes: 24h pipeline health metrics with P95 for SLA tracking.
